name: Lemon Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 package (1 oz) Instant sugar-free vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring water, rice, raisins, and nutmeg to a boil.
2. Reduce heat until the mixture is absorbed.
3. Cool.
4. Prepare the pudding mix according to package directions.
5. Stir in the lemon peel.
